creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left side shows a long highway with a refrigerated truck and a '2,400km' overlay fading into grey; right side shows a vibrant NSW pasture with cattle and a short dotted line to a FarmThru hub. Clean, minimal text on image.
primary_text:
If your beef travelled 2,400km before reaching the shelf, how fresh can it really be?

Supermarket meat sits in cold storage for weeks. The farmer who raised it is a thousand kilometres away. You will never know their name.

FarmThru is different. 100% grass-fed beef from named NSW farms goes direct to our Brookvale hub. Days old, not weeks. Zero middlemen. The farmer earns a fairer price.

No commitment. Sydney families collect from Brookvale, Monday to Friday.
headline: If your beef travelled 2,400km first
description: Farm-direct regenerative beef. Days old, not weeks. Zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale.
